sprints.title: Core — /finalize endpoint + idempotent webhook registration
sprints.agent_notes: FinalizeConnectionUseCase + POST /connect/:provider/finalize route wired. Idempotent registerWebhookSubscription called at bootstrap when composio.apiKey set. composio.webhookUrl config added with COMPOSIO_WEBHOOK_URL override.

sprints.title: Web — Add sentry/pagerduty/datadog/slack to TRIGGER_CATALOG
sprints.agent_notes: TRIGGER_CATALOG entries added for sentry/pagerduty/datadog/slack. oauth-callback-handler reads connectedAccountId (camelCase) with snake_case fallback. integration-card.tsx translates dot-notation labelKeys via t(). 12 E2E Playwright tests pass. i18n keys added in en.json + pt-br.json.

sprints.title: Core — Sentry payload mapper hardening (spike-first)
sprints.agent_notes: Verified TriggerEventMapper.mapSentryAlert handles both payload shapes: (1) native Sentry webhook format { action, data: { issue } } — passed through unchanged, canParse returns true, NormalizedAlert fields correct; (2) Composio-normalized format { issue: {...} } with no action/data wrapper — mapper wraps as { action: 'created', data: <original> }, canParse returns true, NormalizedAlert fields correct. Level→severity mapping confirmed: fatal→critical, error→high, warning→medium. All 9 tests pass. Fixture at tests/fixtures/composio/sentry-new-issue.raw.json marked as placeholder pending real captured payload from staging.
